goal: requires Sorted(a, 0, a.Length) && Sorted(b, 0, b.Length); ensures Sorted(c, 0, c.Length); ensures c.Length == a.Length + b.Length; ensures multiset(c[..]) == multiset(a[..]) + multiset(b[..])

{}

goal: requires 0 <= lo <= hi <= a.Length; modifies a; ensures Sorted(a, lo, hi); ensures multiset(a[lo..hi]) == multiset(old(a[lo..hi])); ensures forall i :: 0 <= i < lo || hi <= i < a.Length ==> a[i] == old(a[i]); decreases hi - lo

{}

{}

requires 0 <= lo < hi <= a.Length; modifies a; ensures lo <= p < hi; ensures forall i :: lo <= i < p ==> a[i] <= a[p]; ensures forall i :: p < i < hi ==> a[i] > a[p]; ensures multiset(a[lo..hi]) == multiset(old(a[lo..hi]))

requires holder < nodes.Length; requires nodes[holder] == true; requires forall i :: 0 <= i < nodes.Length && i != holder ==> nodes[i] == false; modifies nodes; ensures nodes[(holder + 1) % nodes.Length] == true; ensures forall i :: 0 <= i < nodes.Length && i != (holder + 1) % nodes.Length ==> nodes[i] == false
tactic_proof:

  requires holder < nodes.Length
  requires nodes[holder] == true
  requires forall i :: 0 <= i < nodes.Length && i != holder ==> nodes[i] == false
  modifies nodes
  ensures nodes[(holder + 1) % nodes.Length] == true
  ensures forall i :: 0 <= i < nodes.Length && i != (holder + 1) % nodes.Length ==> nodes[i] == false
{}
